title: Document auto-helper routing for reviewer conflicts
description: Operator identified that routine no-self-review reviewer conflicts should not be escalated back to the operator when existing MAP helper policy can solve them. Document the default path: if a submitted task needs review, a live reviewer has a self-review conflict, and no clean core reviewer is immediately available, the owning agent should create a helper note, spawn a visible review helper with --terminal wezterm-tab, send a bounded review packet, and continue without an operator decision unless helper spawning itself is blocked or risky.
acceptance_criteria: MAP instructions explicitly say routine no-self-review reviewer conflicts should auto-route to a visible helper when no clean core reviewer is available
Helper-agent guide includes the concrete steps for this review-conflict path
Validators pass after the documentation update
